title: UI/UX Designer Fellowship
instructors: Arindam Mukherjeeteaches the curriculum in the first 3 weeks. He is the co-founder of NextLeap and was previously the head of consumer product and growth at Flipkart for almost 7 years. He holds a Harvard Business School MBA and is an alum of IIT Kharagpur, with close to 2 decades of experience in the technology industry.
Karthi Subbaramanleads the design team at ServiceNow and has previously worked at Microsoft and Salesforce as part of the design leadership team. She teaches the user research module.
Kartik Singhis a senior product designer at Microsoft and teaches the Wireframing & UX Foundations modules.
Devanshis a Product Lead at Jiostar and was previously a Product Manager at Flipkart. He teaches the case hour sessions.
Marmik Patelis a senior UX Designer at AirBnb and teaches the Design Systems and Android Material Design Deepdive modules.
Ashutosh Vashishthais a design advocate with Apple and teaches the module on iOS HIG Deepdive
Ranganath Krishnamaniis one of the most respected creative designers in India and is the founder of the creative design studio LiquidInk Design. He teaches the modules on Visual Design.
Neel Rajheads the design team at the fintech start-up Kredit Pe and has previously worked at Flipkart, Myntra and GoIbibo. He teaches the Figma Hour sessions.
Sharang Sharmaleads the AI design initiatives at Agentic Path and teaches the module on Agentic UX & AI Design
Bharat Apatis a senior designer with Tide and teaches the module on Building a UX Design Portfolio
